name: scroll
description: Vertical scroll layout — all slides rendered in DOM simultaneously, navigated by scrolling with a collapsible left TOC panel and top progress bar.

content_rules.notes: Scroll layout allows higher information density per slide. Longer explanations and sub-bullet nesting are acceptable.

incompatible_styles.name: visual-heavy
incompatible_styles.reason: Full-bleed background images work best with fixed-height slides. Scroll layout's variable-height slides may cause background-image sizing issues on long content slides.

recommended_structure.pattern: Cover → Speaker Intro → [Part Divider → 8-12 Content → Summary] × N → Contact
recommended_structure.notes: Scroll layout supports deep dives. Chapter dividers + summary slides per part work well. TOC panel is always visible.

author: co-deck
